solo.description: Personal high-discipline work. Hooks on, review required, HMAC optional except high-risk.

strict.description: Default v3 adoption profile. Hooks on, enforced session close, high-risk HMAC, telemetry segment verification.

team.description: Two-person or small-team profile. Requires strict profile plus independent review and protected main branch.

production.description: Highest-trust profile for sensitive production systems. Requires strict profile plus external backup and protected review workflow.

limits: Runtime model enforcement depends on Codex exposing model-used metadata.
HMAC only proves external approval if the secret is kept outside the Codex session.
Local hash chains do not replace off-site telemetry backup.
